insight: Orphan abbreviations persist after tag removal — always trace content references when deleting a definition source
author: chosh1179

insight: Replaced persona with agent across 15 files — CC native vocabulary alignment over legacy internal terminology
author: chosh1179
context: <personas> tag and <persona_index> were removed earlier but 30 persona references remained in content

insight: 3-tier output convention: topic-based (specs/plans), living doc (reports), inline (test/build/cleanup) — eliminates per-invocation overwrite problem
author: chosh1179

insight: <token_note> is not CC-native — CC reads it as plain text with no special processing; removed 18 instances with zero behavioral impact
author: chosh1179

insight: Dead test code survives tag removal — tests parsing removed XML tags silently skip/pass instead of failing, masking dead code
author: chosh1179
context: TestPersonaIntegrity and TestCommandPersonaRefs were always skipping since <personas> tags were gone

insight: 35 files, -82 lines net, 1355 tests passing, 0 regressions — terminology + convention + dead code cleanup in single commit
author: chosh1179

insight: Bash destructive guard hook이 _comment 없이 설치된 잔재가 user hook으로 오인되어 --force 재설치마다 중복 누적 (4개까지 증가)
author: ajitta
context: _is_superclaude_hook()가 command 문자열에 매칭되는 마커 없이 _comment만 의존

insight: Hook 식별은 command 문자열 패턴과 _comment 양쪽 모두 커버해야 함 — _comment만 의존하면 이전 버전 잔재를 놓침
author: ajitta

insight: BLOCKED: destructive 마커를 SUPERCLAUDE_HOOK_MARKERS에 추가하여 command 내용 기반 식별 가능하게 함
author: ajitta
